title: Customer Churn Prediction
summary: Predictive modeling to identify at-risk customers and improve retention strategies.

details.Problem: Classify telecom customers likely to cancel service to enable proactive retention.
details.Feature Engineering: One-hot encoding, tenure binning, scaling numerical features.
details.Results: Achieved 0.82 ROC-AUC with 78% Recall on churn class.

title: Weather Forecasting
summary: Time-series forecasting model to predict daily temperature and rainfall.

details.Problem: Forecast next-day weather conditions using historical climate data.
details.Feature Engineering: Lag features, rolling windows, seasonal decomposition.
details.Results: RMSE of 2.1°C on test set forecasts.

title: Breast Cancer Classification
summary: Diagnostic support tool to classify tumor biopsies as benign or malignant.

details.Problem: Accurately classify cell nuclei features to assist medical diagnosis.
details.Feature Engineering: Standardization, correlation analysis for feature selection.

title: House Price Prediction
summary: Regression model to estimate property values based on features and location.

details.Problem: Predict continuous sale prices from multi-modal housing data.
details.Feature Engineering: Handling missing values, log-transforming target, label encoding.
details.Results: R2 Score of 0.89; Top 15% on leaderboard benchmarks.

title: Heart Disease Prediction
summary: Risk assessment model to predict presence of heart disease from clinical metrics.

details.Problem: Early detection of heart disease risk using patient health indicators.
details.Results: 85% Accuracy on test set with balanced precision/recall.
